figures.caption: Figure 1: Synthetic experiments in the realizable exact-fit setting. Panel (a) compares empirical forgetting with the explicit upper bound and a coarse projector-based O(1/k) baseline in the shared-null-spike family. Panel (b) compares the empirical local decay rate with the analytic ρΠ in the same family. Panel (c) shows the effect of task-family richness in the angle-richness reservoir family using a dense 30-point sweep of L: larger richness L decreases ρΠ and lowers long-horizon empirical forgetting.
Table 1: Numerical estimation procedures for the main quantities in the paper. The bounds assume low-rank projector application through Qt ∈ Rd×r.
